260.text: Kawawang Pilipino. 😢
What a thorough research you did here, Morning Coffee Thoughts 2.0 ❤️

Don't expect much from comelec...
They have never ever applied election laws on the rich and powerful???
At the end of the day isang malaking sindikado ang gobyerno ng pilipinas. Sa sobrang laki dapat controlled lang kung sino ang tatamaan otherwise damay silang lahat.
Klarong klaro na violation, pinipilit pang i-justify... too shallow a reason to circumvent the purpose of the law...

This ruling if approved by COMELEC en banc will absolve the rest of the elected officials who received donations from contractors that include the president, vice president no less. George Garcia's stance of saying there could be a violation is just to get some 'pogi' from the public. Come on, he was lawyering for some of them before he was appointed to COMELEC. His underlings are doing the dirty job. Sobrang panggagago na ito sa bayan, 'separate juridical personality' daw yong owner from the corporation who owns 99.333% of it. Dissolve COMELEC now. The creation of a new poll body led by competent people with integrity is urgent if we want a credible, honest election.

grabe heart ang ganda ng ginagawa mo dito nagbibigay ka hindi lang ng art lessons pero ng memories sa mga kids na dadalhin nila habang lumalaki very heart warming https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1Avd2gRQ9z/
Sino kaya magtutulak Ng impeachment ni comelec chairman Garcia?
This is an example of “YOU CAN BEND THE LAW”

COMELEC wala na talagang intergridad at delikadesa. 
Pakapalan na ng muka.

COMELEC has always been a big dismay as an institution for decades! Halos lahat ng commissioners at chairpersons ay questionable ang backgrounds. Walang matino at mahusay! Imagine, sa time ni PNoy, corrupt din ang nahuha nyang chairperson!
Why does this still happen even in the midst of the peoples' seething anger against  corruption. Looks like people in position aren't listening or just in impunity mode forever.
And we wonder why corruption abounds 🤷‍♀️because Comelec and other agencies and government offices that should protect the interest of the public is protecting the interests of the politicians 💩🤬
Ginawa na naman tanga ang mga pinoy
Check nyo nalang ung batas. Cleared na sya.
Comolecta na ata! It has lost its credibility since the 2022 election. So what else can we expect?

The question now is, what can be done to rectify (read: overturn) the decision? This is a dangerous precedent which opens the floodgates to violations of Comelec tules snd a threat to constitutional demoracy
The very LAW was very clear. DIRECTLY or INDIRECTLY.
There is something questionable about Garcia's decision. Off the hook kaagad si Keso ganun ganun lang. The bias shows.
Tsk,tsk
An insult to commonsense.
COMELEC, shame shame shame.
What about Beneficial Ownership?
Does  Chairman Garcia's being Escudero's Election lawyer have anything to weight on this?
Huwag isama si Chiz sa intriga..
Kailan tatalakayin ng en banc?

@followers 
@highlight
Magkano kaya ang pumasok sa mga bank accounts nila?

eversince COMELEC IS THE BIGGEST PROBLEM IN THE COUNTRY  ! They Have the Choices Who to  Take Over The Seat as Long As The Price is Right !!!  Remembee FPJ  ? How Come FPJ ZERO VOTE IN MINDANAO?  Ibig bang Sabihin Pati  Representative Nya Hindi Bumoto Sa Kanya?

Can somebody file administrative against those who dismissed the case for gross neglect of duty.
It is simple, Lubiano is the owner of the corporation who has a contract with the government. This fact alone is within the purview and violation of election law.
These people are making the Filipino ashamed of themselves.
Kung hindi ito bending the law, ito ay malinaw na ignorance ot the law...naLAWko na.😅
Garcia, himself must be investigated...
May tatamaan seguro iba kay naging pabor ang desisyon kay chiz.

Literal na pambabaluktot ng comelec sa batas. Kahit magsisigaw pa tayo dito at sa kalsada. Pag ang nasa posisyon ay hindi takot at kayang kaya nilang linangin ang mga tao. Sa kadahilanang NAPAKAHINA AT WALANG NGIPIN ang pinakamataas na pinuno ng bansa. Ay wala tayong magagawa sa ngayon kundi ang mag antay matapos ang kanilang termino. Ang mga matatalino kuno na hinalal ninyo ay ginagamit ang binigay ninyong kapangyarihan sa kanila. Para lamang balahurain ang batas at ang kasagraduhan ng halalan. Walang umuusig kasi wala sa posisyon ang mga taong me kakayanang umusig. 
Kaya, patuloy tayong lalapastanganin ng mga ganid ng mga demonyong ito. Kung hindi tayo magbabago sa pagpili ng tamang mga binuboto.  Dead end na ito until 2028. Ito ang sukli o kabayaran ng inyong kabobohan. Tangapin ninyo ang pait at hapdi na dulot ng inyong katangahan.  Karamay ang lahat ng mga Pilipino lalo na ang mga inosenteng kabataan. Maawa naman kayo sa bayan. Naway, patawarin sila ng Dios sa kanilang mga ginagawa sa bayan. Maging mapanuri at maging Critical Thinker sa panahon ng karimlan.
Kc daw hindi naman "natural person" si Lubiano. Sya daw ay taga Planet Mars. Akala ng taga Comolec ang Sorsogon ay sa Mars.

Am sure Comelec knows the law
But circumvents the law in favor of favored individuals
@highlight
Thanks for this, Sir Gino. Makes me wonder if the Comelec Commissioner Rey Bulay turned a blind eye or was influenced. I hope the COMELEC en banc overturns this decision.
Is george garcia even qualified to decide on this case? The mere fact that he was a former lawyer of chiz escudero should have rendered him unfit to decide on this case bec of the obvious bias.

Mas naniwla sila sa kwento ni lubiano! Kisa pagiging contractor niya! Dpat ang inalam nila Kung may contrata ba sya sa gobyerno! Kung private contractor sya ok lng! At Kung deniclare nya ba sa soce nya ang donation na natanggap nya! Kung hindi may violation pa din dun at malamang nagkasuhulan yan kapalit ng pag basura sa kaso nitong suspected bicam insertor! Na ito!..

Please see the comments of former COMELEC Commissioner Luie Guia. He clarifies that the decision was merely a recommendation of a unit of the COMELEC, not yet a COMELEC en banc decision. (Dagdag ko: and yes, dapat mag-inhibit si Garcia when that time comes)
Kung sino pa yung dapat na unang pananggalang sa corruption sila pa yung unang nabibili. Kaya hanggang ngayon ang dali parin makapagfile ng COC kahit walang credentials eh
Sabi ni Atty. Falcis dati election lawyer ni Chiz si Chairman Garcia. Abangan naten ung case ni marcoleta.
So saan pala kukuha ng pera si lubiano kung wala syang business diba? Dahil sa business nya nagkapera sya. Shame on you #COMELEC
With Supreme Court ruling on election advertisement during election ban, Sara's impeachment. What do you expect from comelec?
Ibalik nyo na lang ang mga nakaw sa flood control funds sa mga mamayan sa pamamagitan ng ma exempted man lang lang sa mga taxes sa mga maliliit na negosyante na alam nyong sobra ang kaltas sa taxes
The impunity…Ginagawang tanga ang mga Pinoys
Ninanakawan na tayo, ginagago pa. When we let our values slide and let corrupt congressmen and senators and their greedy political dynasties slide, then we get the government we deserve.
